audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds. ValidatePayloadWhenMergeCompletes enforces parent_hash == state.latest_execution_payload_header.block_hash after merge (L141). All block processing paths (ProcessBlockForStateRoot → ProcessPayload → ValidatePayloadWhenMergeCompletes) enforce this check. Checkpoint sync deserializes historical state without validation, but this is safe because checkpoint states are from finalized blocks, and all new blocks post-checkpoint must pass this validation.
